transcript.text: Hello everyone, my name is Hisham Moussaid, I am 24 years old.
I was born originally in Azelal, but 7 years ago, maybe 8 years ago, we moved here to
Bani Mela so I could continue my studies.
Right now I have a master's degree in intelligence systems for education.
I am passionate about technology, artificial intelligence, and how digital tools can
help people learn and improve better.
Before this master's degree, I have studied computer science and information systems.
During my studies, I have worked on multiple academic projects related to programming,
web development, and AI.
I was also able to land an internship in a company here in Bani Mela called
JMsoft.
It really helped me a lot to improve my technical and teamwork skills.
Right now I am working on a project called Speech Coach.
It is a system that analyzes a person speaking in a video.
So what it does basically is it takes a video, it extracts both audio and images,
we call them also frames, then the system studies audio metrics like for example
speaking speed, the number of pauses, hesitations, etc.
Not only that, but it also analyzes visual aspects like for example face presence,
eye contact, hand gestures, etc.
The goal is to help students improve their communication skills using automatic feedback.
I really love combining artificial intelligence and education because I believe that technology
should help and support teachers and learners and not replace them.
Of course in the future I hope to become an educator who uses these digital tools
to give more effective and more better learning experiences.
